boosts.name: Advanced Training
boosts.description: Advanced Training <Reaction> <Any Phase>: When a Friendly Support unit activates a Special Ability, resolve its Special Ability with the CP cost reduced by 1. Don't exhaust this card.
Speed on Creep <Passive> <Any Phase>: If the active Friendly Zerg unit is ON CREEP, increase its Speed characteristic by 1.
boosts.name: Speed on Creep
Living Glob of Tissue
boosts.description: Living Glob of Tissue <Passive> <Any Phase>: Creep Tumor tokens have STAY IN PLAY and DISPLACEMENT.
Creep Removal <Passive> <Any Phase>: If an Enemy unit ends a Move, Run, Charge or Disengage action within 1" of a Creep Tumor token, remove that token from the battlefield.
boosts.name: Creep Removal
Vehicle Weapons
boosts.description: Vehicle Weapons <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Mechanical unit’s first used Ranged Weapons gain CRITICAL HIT (1).
Vehicle Plating <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Mechanical unit makes an Armor roll. It gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.
boosts.name: Vehicle Plating

boosts.description: Go! Go! Go! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.
boosts.name: Go! Go! Go!
Go! Go! Go!
boosts.description: Go! Go! Go! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.

Armed and Ready <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological unit Deploys from any table edge that is not a Player’s Entry Edge. This action must end more than 10" away from any enemy model. You cannot use this ability if another Friendly Biological unit has already Deployed this Round.
boosts.name: Armed and Ready
Go! Go! Go!
boosts.description: Go! Go! Go! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.
Let's Have a Blast! <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Biological unit’s first used Ranged Weapon gains ANTI-EVADE (1).
boosts.name: Let's Have a Blast!

boosts.description: Mass Recall <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once per Game. Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. All Friendly Protoss units within 6" of this Faction Indicator are removed from the battlefield and placed in Reserves.
boosts.name: Mass Recall
Dae’Uhl
boosts.description: Dae’Uhl <Reaction> <Any Phase>: When a Friendly unit receives Damage, reduce the Total Damage by 2 (to minimum of 1).
Strap in! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active, unengaged Ground unit is placed in Reserves instead of performing an action.
boosts.name: Strap in!

boosts.description: Ready For Dust-off <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. At the End of the Round, you may Deploy one Ground unit from Reserves in Base Contact with this Faction Indicator.
boosts.name: Ready For Dust-off
Infantry Weapons
boosts.description: Infantry Weapons <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Biological unit’s first used Ranged Weapon gains CRITICAL HIT (1).

boosts.name: Infantry Armor
boosts.description: Infantry Armor <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Biological unit makes an Armor roll. It gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.

boosts.name: Extended Claws
boosts.description: Extended Claws <Active> <Assault Phase>: The Active Unit applies a +1 Modifier to its IMPACT HITS rolls.
Carapace <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly unit makes an Armor roll. It gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.
boosts.name: Carapace

boosts.description: Field Repair <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Mechanical unit resolves the HEAL (2) effect.
boosts.name: Field Repair

boosts.description: Ground Weapons <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Ground unit’s first used Ranged Weapon gains CRITICAL HIT (1).
boosts.name: Ground Weapons

boosts.description: Ground Armor <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a GROUND unit makes an Armor Roll. It gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.
boosts.name: Ground Armor
Quick Strikes
boosts.description: Quick Strikes <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active unit’s first used Close Combat Weapon gains PRECISION (2).
Zealous Charge <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active unit gain BUFF SPEED (2).
boosts.name: Zealous Charge
Quick Strikes
boosts.description: Quick Strikes <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active unit’s first used Close Combat Weapon gains PRECISION (2).
Lie in Wait <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active unengaged Ground unit gains BURROWED status.
boosts.name: Lie in Wait

boosts.description: Creep Spread <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Creep Tumor token on the battlefield within 6" of either a Friendly Entry Edge or an existing Friendly Creep Tumor token.
boosts.name: Creep Spread

boosts.description: Missile Attacks <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active unit’s first used Ranged Weapon gain PRECISION (2).
boosts.name: Missile Attacks

boosts.description: Omega Network <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once Per Game. Place an Omega Worm unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 10" away from any Enemy model. This round Omega Worm is not eligble to use its special abilities (excluding Structure).
boosts.name: Omega Network
Wild Mutation
boosts.description: Wild Mutation <Active> <Any Phase>: If the active unit is ON CREEP, the unit gains BUFF Speed (1) and its first used Weapon gains PRECISION (1).

boosts.name: Zerg Creep
boosts.description: Zerg Creep <Passive> <Any Phase>: During Army Building, you must select exactly one Creep Card and add it to your Army List, paying its listed cost (if any).

boosts.name: Pylon Warp-In
boosts.description: Pylon Warp-In <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once Per Game. Place a Pylon unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 10" away from any Enemy model. This round Pylon is not eligble to use its special abilities (excluding Structure).
Bound by the Khala <Active> <Movement Phase>: At the end of this Unit's Activation, select one other Friendly unit that is eligible to Activate in the current Phase. Immediately Activate that unit.
boosts.name: Bound by the Khala
Predation
boosts.description: Predation <Active> <Any Phase>: The active unit’s Weapons gain INSTANT.
Creep Spread <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Creep Tumor token on the battlefield within 6" of either a Friendly Entry Edge or an existing Friendly Creep Tumor token
boosts.name: Creep Spread

boosts.description: Creep Removal <Passive> <Any Phase>: If an Enemy unit ends a Move, Run, Charge or Disengage action within 1" of a Creep Tumor token, remove that token from the battlefield.

boosts.description: Strategic Recall <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active, unengaged Ground unit is placed in Reserves instead of performing an action.
boosts.name: Strategic Recall
Photon Overcharge
boosts.description: Photon Overcharge <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use when an Enemy unit enters the battlefield from Reserves via a location other than its own Entry Edge. That unit immediately suffers HITS 3 (1).
Strategic Recall <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active, unengaged Ground unit is placed in Reserves instead of performing an action.
boosts.name: Strategic Recall
Surveillance
boosts.description: Surveillance <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. While within 6" of this Faction Indicator, Enemy units lose the HIDDEN.
ComSat Station <Active> <Movement Phase>: Select one table edge that is not a player’s Entry Edge. Until the End of the Round, Enemy units cannot Deploy from that edge.
boosts.name: ComSat Station
Scanner Sweep
boosts.description: Scanner Sweep <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. While within 6" of this Faction Indicator, Enemy units lose the HIDDEN.

boosts.name: Excrete Creep
boosts.description: Excrete Creep <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use after placing a Creep Tumor token. Immediately place an additional Creep Tumor token within 6" of the original token.

Ventral Sacs <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. At the End of the Round, Deploy one Ground unit from Reserves in Base Contact with this Faction Indicator.
boosts.name: Ventral Sacs
Pneumatized Carapace
boosts.description: Pneumatized Carapace <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use after the Friendly unit rolls a D6 for Charge Distance. Roll an additional D6. Select the highest result to calculate the total distance.

boosts.name: Oversight Mode
boosts.description: Oversight Mode <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. While within 6" of this Faction Indicator, Enemy units lose the HIDDEN.
Guardian Shell <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a GROUND unit makes an Armor Roll. It gains DODGE (2) for this roll.
boosts.name: Guardian Shell

boosts.description: Rapid Reinforcements <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Defense Drone unit anywhere on the battlefield, more than 1" away from any Enemy model.
boosts.name: Rapid Reinforcements

boosts.description: Ready for Pickup? <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once Per Game. The active unit resolves the PLACE (12) effect. Models placed by this effect cannot be set up within Engagement Range of any Enemy unit. This resolves instead of performing a standard Action.
boosts.name: Ready for Pickup?

boosts.description: Nasty Surprise <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Ground unit loses its BURROWED status.
boosts.name: Nasty Surprise
Feral Rage
boosts.description: Feral Rage <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active unit’s first used Close Combat Weapon gains PRECISION (2).
Rampage <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active Zergling unit, first used Close Combat Weapon gains + 1 modifier to hit rolls.
boosts.name: Rampage

boosts.description: Timing Push <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Zergling unit Deploys from any table edge that is not a Player’s Entry Edge. This action must end more than 10" away from any Enemy model.
boosts.name: Timing Push
Additional Supply Depots
boosts.description: Additional Supply Depots <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active unit's Supply value is improved by 1 for the purpose of Controling and Contesting objectives and completing missions.

boosts.name: Tactical Retreat
boosts.description: Tactical Retreat <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active unit ignores the Disengage Penalty for the remainder of the Round.
Advanced Optics <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Biological unit may select an Engaged Enemy unit as the target of Ranged Attacks.
boosts.name: Advanced Optics
Weapons of the Firstborn
boosts.description: Weapons of the Firstborn <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Grounds unit’s first used Ranged Weapons gain BUFF Range (4).

boosts.name: Veil of Shadows
boosts.description: Veil of Shadows <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use after a Friendly unit resolves a PLACE effect. That unit immediately resolves the HEAL (2) effect.
Quick Strikes <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active unit’s first used Close Combat Weapon gains PRECISION (2).
boosts.name: Quick Strikes

boosts.description: Warp In <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Ground unit Deploys from any table edge that is not a Player’s Entry Edge This action must end more than 10" away from any Enemy model. You cannot use this ability if another Friendly Ground unit has already Deployed this Round.
boosts.name: Warp In
Phase
boosts.description: Phase <Active> <Movment Phase>: The active unit resolves the PLACE (4) effect.

Warp Conduit <Active> <Movement Phase>: Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. At the End of the Round, you may Deploy one Ground unit from Reserves in Base Contact with this Faction Indicator.

boosts.description: Attack Move <Reaction> <Combat Phase>: When a Friendly unit becomes Unengaged, it immediately perform a Move action.
boosts.name: Attack Move
Instinctive Reaction
boosts.description: Instinctive Reaction <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use when an Enemy unit declares a Close Combat Attack against a Friendly Unit. That Friendly Unit becomes eligible to make an Evade roll against that attack.

boosts.name: Rapid Burrowing
boosts.description: Rapid Burrowing <Active> <Movement Phase>: Select one Friendly, unengaged Ground Zerg race unit on the battlefield. It gains Burrowed status, even if it has already Activated this Round.

boosts.name: Brood Instinct
boosts.description: Brood Instinct <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly unit makes an Evade roll. Apply a +1 modifier to the roll.
Zerg Creep <Passive> <Any Phase>: During Army Building, you must select exactly one Creep Card and add it to your Army List, paying its listed cost (if any).
